visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with styled brown hair, wearing a black t-shirt and white pants, sits on a brown leather couch in an indoor setting. He holds a stack of white papers in his hands and looks down at them with an expressive face, his mouth moving as if speaking. The background features a white brick wall, a small side table with a 'Lawson Station' sign, and a low wooden table in front of him with a smartphone and more documents. (2) The man looks up at the camera, pointing at the papers and gesturing with his right hand. He maintains an energetic expression with frequent eyebrow movements. Yellow text boxes with black numbers appear as overlays in the lower center of the frame. (3) A woman with long straight black hair, wearing a grey jacket over a black shirt, is shown sitting on the same couch next to the man. She looks towards him and gestures with her hands while the man continues his active delivery. (4) The man claps his hands together sharply and then holds both hands up, palms facing out. He then leans forward, pointing his finger towards the camera and looking slightly frustrated yet amused. Additional text overlays appear with a scratchy, hand-drawn aesthetic. (5) The man and woman engage in a back-and-forth interaction. The man touches his chest and continues to shuffle the papers, his facial expressions alternating between serious and smiling. (6) The video concludes with the man looking into the camera with a slightly defeated expression as a final variety-style text graphic appears over his chest.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來跟大家總結分享一下. [Logo]: @yga. (2) [Subtitle]: 我們的二次法拍的斬獲. (3) [Subtitle]: 總共拿到的金額是. (4) [Slogan]: 新北法拍獲得 101100元. (5) [Subtitle]: 我們鑑價花了. (6) [Slogan]: 新北鑑價費 103200元. (7) [Subtitle]: 所以我們新北法拍. (8) [Slogan]: 我們倒賠. (9) [Slogan]: 我們倒賠2100元. (10) [Subtitle]: 至少超過半年的時間. (11) [Subtitle]: 全部人耗在那. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後那邊來來回回. (13) [Subtitle]: 這還不包括前面講的新北的. (14) [Slogan]: 不包含 查封的費用. (15) [Slogan]: 不包含 員警車馬費. (16) [Subtitle]: 那我們去新北也有破門進去. (17) [Slogan]: 不包含 鎖匠的費用. (18) [Slogan]: 律師費. (19) [Slogan]: 人力成本. (20) [Subtitle]: 所以我們新北倒賠2100. (21) [Subtitle]: 啊這個台中倒賠2600. (22) [Subtitle]: 所以我們總共. (23) [Slogan]: 負 4700塊. (24) [Subtitle]: 但對林小姐來說她是賺到了. (25) [Subtitle]: 她的還款計畫就是. [Variety]: 搞亂你.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator and 1 female co-host/assistant sitting together.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with short brown hair, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt and white joggers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio set designed to look like a living room, featuring a white brick wall, a brown couch, a Lawson Station brand decoration, and documents on a low table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker begins with a high-energy, fast-paced speech in Traditional Chinese. His delivery is articulated and enthusiastic. A background acoustic guitar track with a light beat plays continuously. (2) A sharp percussive hit sound effect triggers as he reveals the first set of numbers. The male voice exhibits wide pitch variability, rising on key numbers. (3) A female voice interjects with a calm, conversational tone, supporting the male's narrative. The male voice responds with a humorous, exaggerated inflection. (4) A loud hand-clap sound occurs, followed by the sound of paper rustling as the man flips through his documents. The BGM remains steady in volume underneath the vocals. (5) The male speaker lists a series of items rapidly, punctuated by short 'pop' sound effects synced with the appearance of text on screen. (6) The vocal intensity peaks as the final total is shared, followed by a slight decrease in pitch as the speaker delivers a sarcastic concluding remark.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to humorously share the financial outcomes of participating in legal property auctions. The speaker highlights that after accounting for various hidden costs like valuation fees, lawyer fees, and locksmiths, the net result was actually a loss, serving as a cautionary and entertaining story for the audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays and sound effects to maintain engagement during a financial summary.
